name: Transit
content: Along with your normal intercity bus options of Greyhound and FlixBus, the Michigan traveler has some more bespoke options, such as Indian Trails. When I missed my midnight bus with Indian Trails, I called the bus company, they noted that I had not gotten on the bus the night before, and allowed me to transfer my ticket to the next day free of charge. The other travellers on the bus were also pretty nice people, and talked with me about King Gizzard and the Wizard Lizard or showed me large caterpillars they found in the middle of the night.
